questions.question: Compare and contrast Black Box, White Box, and Gray Box testing methods. How do these methods differ in terms of testing objectives, scope, and approach? (15 marks)
Explain the key principles of Agile methodology and its importance in software development projects. How does Agile help in reducing project risks and improving team collaboration? (20 marks)

Choose two software testing methods (e.g., Equivalence Partitioning, Boundary Value Analysis) and describe their strengths and weaknesses. How would you apply these methods to a specific software development project? (25 marks)
